title: pgstat — Instance Detail
description: Tek instance icin 360 derece gorunum. Instance dropdown'dan sec, time range degistir, kritik metrikler bugun/dun/gecen hafta/gecen ay overlay'leri ile karsilastirilir. Top 20 sorgu/tablo tablolarina tiklayinca drill-down dashboard'una sicrar.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and state = 'active'
select count(*) as value from ops.alert where instance_pk = $instance and status = 'open'
select cache_hit_ratio as value from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance order by sample_ts desc limit 1
select avg((xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(period_wal_size_byte), 0) as value from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'
select coalesce(sum(blks_read_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)

panels.title: Bağlantı Sayısı — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay
panels.description: Trend karşılaştırması: 4 zaman dilimi üst üste. Aynı saat aralığındaki değerler.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, max(numbackends) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: WAL Üretimi (bayt/sn) — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay
panels.description: Otomatik birim: KB/MB/GB/TB. Click+drag ile zoom.

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Dün" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum(period_wal_size_byte / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: TPS — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum((xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum((xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum((xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum((xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta) / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, avg(cache_hit_ratio) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, avg(cache_hit_ratio) as "Dün" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, avg(cache_hit_ratio) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, avg(cache_hit_ratio) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_cluster_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

panels.title: Disk Read (bayt/sn) — bugün vs dün vs geçen hafta vs geçen ay

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192 / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Bugün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '1 day', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192 / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Dün" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '1 day' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '7 days', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192 / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen hafta" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '7 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts + interval '30 days', $interval) as time, sum(blks_read_delta * 8192 / nullif(extract(epoch from sample_interval), 0)) as "Geçen ay" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts between $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' and $__timeTo()::timestamptz - interval '30 days' group by 1 order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, state as metric, count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) and state is not null group by 1, state order by 1

select $__timeGroup(sample_ts, $interval) as time, wait_event_type as metric, count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) and wait_event_type is not null group by 1, wait_event_type order by 1

panels.title: Top 20 Sorgu — toplam exec süresi (tıkla → drill-down)

targets.rawSql: select left(coalesce(qt.query_text, '?'), 200) as query, dbr.datname as db, sum(d.calls_delta) as calls, round(sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric, 0) as total_ms, round((sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.calls_delta), 0))::numeric, 2) as mean_ms, sum(d.rows_delta) as rows, sum(d.shared_blks_read_delta) * 8192 as disk_read, sum(d.wal_bytes_delta) as wal_bytes from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.query_text qt on qt.query_text_id = ss.query_text_id left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = ss.dbid where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by 1, 2 order by total_ms desc limit 20

select rr.schemaname || '.' || rr.relname as relation, t.n_live_tup as live, t.n_dead_tup as dead, round(100.0 * t.n_dead_tup / nullif(t.n_live_tup + t.n_dead_tup, 0), 1) as dead_pct, t.last_autovacuum from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join dim.relation_ref rr on rr.relation_id = t.relation_id where t.instance_pk = $instance and t.sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance) and t.n_dead_tup > 1000 order by dead_pct desc nulls last limit 20
select alert_id, severity, alert_code, opened_at, occurrence_count, left(title, 80) as title from ops.alert where instance_pk = $instance and status = 'open' order by opened_at desc limit 50
